corrections_by_claim.note: Mention of AI/EV industries is purely as a demand-side driver for mineral acquisition, not an analysis of the production mode.
No engagement with search or data mechanisms.
Discusses state diplomacy and resource strategy, but not the state's constitutive role in the internal economic logic or market dominance of specific tech firms.
No engagement with profit vs. rent.
No balance sheet or asset analysis.
No engagement with the theoretical debate on expropriation.
